title: Rubber Defies Lightning
description: The sound of the bell ends the war and lets Shandia, Skypieans, and the Straw Hats understand what was protected.
scene: Across pages 13, this scene focuses on Nico Robin, Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa. The sound of the bell ends the war and lets Shandia, Skypieans, and the Straw Hats understand what was protected.
summary: The sound of the bell ends the war and lets Shandia, Skypieans, and the Straw Hats understand what was protected.
